rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped background citation used to illustrate that certain ad tactics (including negative comparisons) can raise perceived manipulative intent and hurt evaluations. In the citing article, Jain and Posavac (2004) is not discussed in detail, not singled out for theory building, and not used as a direct methodological or measurement source. The core contribution and hypotheses are built around regulatory focus and persuasion knowledge, so this citation functions as contextual prior evidence rather than a specific substantive building block.
